prompt: Generate a photorealistic product packaging mockup for a premium matcha energy drink named “FOCUS LEAF”. Scene: one sleek aluminum can on a matte stone surface with soft morning window light. Important details: minimalist Japanese-inspired design, pale green and cream palette, condensation droplets, realistic shadows. Include exact label text: “FOCUS LEAF”, “MATCHA + L-THEANINE”, “ZERO SUGAR”, “12 FL OZ”. Use case: product concept. Constraints: all text must be spelled correctly, no extra brand names, no distorted typography.
